cards.rules_text:
Fearsome [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)[/i]
When Elise attacks, create a tapped and attacking Spiderling token.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if you control three or more other spider creatures, transform Elise.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
Fearsome, Challenger [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)[/i]
Other spiders your control have Fearsome and Challenger.

cards.rules_text:
First strike
When Draven enters, or whenever Draven deals combat damage, create a Spinning Axe token.
At the end of combat, if Draven attacked and was not destroyed while equipped with a Spinning Axe, put a Glory counter on Draven. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Draven has two or more Glory counters, remove all Glory counters from Draven, then transform him.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
First strike, Trample
When Draven transforms, or whenever Draven deals combat damage, create a Spinning Axe token.
cards.flavor_text2: [i]“The best is wherever I decide to set the bar each day.” — Draven[/i]
